en_title: Hideo Kojima Warns of 'Frightening' Digital Future After PlayStation Reveals Plan to End Physical Disc Production
cn_title: 小岛秀夫警告「可怕」数字未来：索尼将停产PlayStation实体光盘
subtitle: 水龙头不会永远开
opus_summary: 索尼宣布将停止生产PlayStation实体光盘后，小岛秀夫在罗马电影节谈到全数字未来的风险。他认为一旦内容转向流媒体，用户只剩访问权，喜欢的电影和游戏可能随时无法观看或游玩。

paragraphs.en: Metal Gear Solid and Death Stranding creator Hideo Kojima has warned of a "frightening" digital future just days after Sony announced it would soon end production for physical PlayStation discs.
paragraphs.cn: 在索尼宣布很快将停止生产PlayStation实体光盘几天后，《合金装备》和《死亡搁浅》创作者小岛秀夫警告了一个「可怕」的数字未来。

paragraphs.en: Kojima shared his feelings about the shift away from physical media during a conversation at the Il Cinema in Piazza film festival in Rome (according to a translation by Genki ). His comments follow the news that production of new PlayStation discs would come to an end in January 2028 , and although he doesn't seem to directly reference Sony by name, it seems pretty clear what's on his mind.
paragraphs.cn: 据Genki翻译，小岛在罗马Il Cinema in Piazza电影节的一场对谈中，分享了自己对远离实体媒介这一转变的感受。他的评论发生在新PlayStation光盘生产将于2028年1月结束的消息之后。虽然他似乎没有直接点名索尼，但他心里在想什么已经相当清楚。

paragraphs.en: "Since production is ending in 2028, this is about video games, but I grew up with physical media, so I find it really sad," Kojima said. "Currently, I’ve been buying up a lot of Blu-rays, such as various movies, and CDs too."
paragraphs.cn: 小岛说：「既然生产会在2028年结束，这说的是电子游戏，但我是和实体媒介一起长大的，所以我真的觉得很难过。目前，我一直在大量购买蓝光，比如各种电影，也在买CD。」

paragraphs.en: Those who have followed Kojima's love for video games, movies, and music shouldn't be surprised to hear he's not thrilled with the way things are going. Mere moments after news of Sony's decision spread across the internet, a message he shared in 2021, warning that individuals may soon have access to data stripped away, resurfaced . He said at the time, "We will not be able to freely access the movies, books, and music that we have loved."
paragraphs.cn: 任何关注过小岛对电子游戏、电影和音乐热爱的人，都不会惊讶于他对事情走向并不兴奋。索尼决定的消息在互联网上传开后不久，他在2021年分享的一条信息重新浮出水面，当时他警告个人可能很快会被剥夺对数据的访问权。他当时说：「我们将无法自由访问自己喜爱的电影、书籍和音乐。」

paragraphs.en: Kojima took his presence at the film festival to update listeners on his perspective on an all-digital future. He also touched on streaming, and how it will affect not only games, but other media, too.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛利用自己出席电影节的机会，向听众更新了他对全数字未来的看法。他也谈到流媒体，以及它不仅会影响游戏，也会影响其他媒介。

paragraphs.en: "The situation is different for games, as they are downloaded to the hard drive, that means the game data remains on your own hardware," he continued. "However, if things shift to streaming in the future, that won’t be the case anymore. With streaming subscription services, like Netflix or Amazon, there is a server somewhere, and you essentially just have the right to turn the tap, and when you do, the data flows out.
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说：「游戏的情况有所不同，因为它们会下载到硬盘里，也就是说游戏数据仍然留在你自己的硬件上。不过，如果未来转向流媒体，情况就不再是这样了。对于Netflix或Amazon这样的流媒体订阅服务，某处有一台服务器，你本质上只是拥有拧开水龙头的权利；当你这么做时，数据就会流出来。」

paragraphs.en: "That’s how movies work on these platforms, right? You don't download the data, you access it directly through a subscription. And the consequence of that is that you don't actually possess the data yourself."
paragraphs.cn: 「这些平台上的电影就是这样运作的，对吧？你不会下载数据，而是通过订阅直接访问它。这样带来的结果是，你实际上并不拥有数据本身。」

paragraphs.en: Fans of physical media ownership have had a lot to be upset about in recent weeks. In late June, Rockstar Games announced that the physical version of GTA 6 would come in a box with no disc , with the game itself available only as a download code.
paragraphs.cn: 最近几周，实体媒介所有权的支持者有很多事情可以不满。6月底，Rockstar Games宣布《GTA6》的实体版会装在一个没有光盘的盒子里，游戏本体只能通过下载码获取。

paragraphs.en: The aftermath of Sony's decision to end physical disc production for PlayStation games has been especially brutal. Even as major corporations, celebrities, and the average gamer blast the company for its decision , it appears it's unlikely to U-turn on the move . All of this arrives just as Sony told digital movie fans they would soon lose access to a library of more than 550 films – even if they had already purchased them.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼决定停止生产PlayStation游戏实体光盘后的余波尤其猛烈。即便大型公司、名人和普通玩家都在抨击这家公司这一决定，看起来它也不太可能回头。所有这些又正好发生在索尼告诉数字电影粉丝，他们很快将失去对550多部电影库访问权的时候，即便他们已经购买过这些电影。

paragraphs.en: Signs seem to point to a focus on digital gaming as the PS6 and Project Helix consoles loom, and players aren't looking forward to what the future may hold. Kojima isn't either.
paragraphs.cn: 随着PS6和Project Helix等主机临近，种种迹象似乎都指向数字游戏重心，而玩家并不期待未来可能带来的东西。小岛也一样。

paragraphs.en: "There are companies that own these servers and let you 'turn the tap' for a monthly fee," he continued. "However, with nations, politics and various ways of thinking, one naturally has to consider the possibility that if there is a change, the data inside will stop being distributed. And if that happens you won’t be able to watch or play the movies and games you like.
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说：「有些公司拥有这些服务器，并让你以月费来『拧开水龙头』。不过，国家、政治以及各种思潮都会变化，自然必须考虑一种可能性：如果发生变化，里面的数据就会停止分发。如果那样发生，你就无法观看或游玩自己喜欢的电影和游戏。」

paragraphs.en: "That is what is frightening. So, what is happening to video games in 2028, might also happen to movies. I’d like everyone to keep that in mind."
paragraphs.cn: 「这就是可怕之处。所以，2028年发生在电子游戏上的事情，也可能发生在电影上。我希望大家记住这一点。」

paragraphs.en: Kojima Productions wrapped up work on Death Stranding 2: On the Beach last year. Next up is his horror project, OD , which we recently learned is safe at Xbox following recent reports of impending studio closures and cancelations . For more, you can read why one IGN writer thinks PlayStation's physical media-free future is offensive .
paragraphs.cn: 小岛工作室去年完成了《死亡搁浅2：冥滩》的工作。接下来是他的恐怖项目《OD》。我们最近得知，尽管有工作室即将关闭和项目取消的报道，这款XBOX项目目前是安全的。更多内容，你可以阅读为什么一名IGN作者认为PlayStation无实体媒介的未来是在冒犯玩家。
